questions: What are the big shifts in 2024 US digital ad revenue?
Which formats and channels are growing fastest?
qa.answer: US digital ad revenue reached new highs with strong growth in retail media, CTV, and short‑form video. Search and social remain largest; privacy and AI shape measurement and optimization.
implication: Evaluate retail media and CTV as part of the mix where audience fit exists.
Plan creative and measurement for short‑form video environments.
Harden first‑party data and clean room workflows to support growth areas.
